meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve can't debug code (Advanced Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't debug code. A Advanced-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: User Onboarding to Solve Debugging Roadblocks
content.seo_description: Learn how to use onboarding flows to isolate logic errors and master debugging. Advanced Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code for AI Builders.
content.answer_block: Debugging isn't just fixing syntax; it's about observability. By implementing structured user onboarding, you create 'checkpoints' in your application state. This allows you to isolate where data flow breaks, turning mysterious crashes into traceable events. Use Antigravity for architectural oversight and Claude Code for iterative, context-aware debugging of your onboarding logic.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a terminal full of red text, the cursor blinking like a heartbeat monitor for a project that’s flatlined. Every student knows the crushing weight of a 'silent' bug—the one that doesn't throw an error, but simply refuses to work. It’s not a lack of coding talent; it’s a lack of visibility into your application’s state.

Imagine a world where your code tells you exactly where it got lost. By transforming your user onboarding flow into a diagnostic tool, you stop guessing and start engineering. This case study bridges the gap between frustration and mastery, showing you how to leverage AI-native tools to architect resilient, self-documenting onboarding flows.

steps.title: Mapping the Onboarding State Machine
steps.description: Before fixing bugs, visualize the onboarding journey to identify where state transitions fail.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current onboarding logic and generate a Mermaid state diagram representing every user milestone and conditional transition.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --file onboarding_flow.ts --task 'map all state transitions and identify potential dead-ends'

steps.title: Injecting Observability Hooks
steps.description: Add telemetry to your onboarding steps to catch silent failures before they crash the UI.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Suggest high-impact logging points for my onboarding flow that track state variables without cluttering the console.

steps.title: Isolating Logic Errors with Claude Code
steps.description: Use AI to trace the exact line where user data fails to persist during onboarding.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review this specific block of code and identify why the session variable is null after the second step of the onboarding flow.

steps.title: Implementing Defensive Validation
steps.description: Wrap your onboarding transitions in schema validation to prevent malformed data from reaching your database.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor my onboarding transition handler to use Zod schema validation for all incoming user input.

steps.title: Automating Regression Testing
steps.description: Ensure your onboarding flow never breaks again by generating automated integration tests.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Playwright test script that simulates a full user onboarding journey and asserts the presence of the final dashboard state.

pro_tips: Treat onboarding as a database migration: if it fails, the user is lost forever. Always include a 'resume' state.
Use 'dry-run' flags in your AI prompts to preview refactors before committing code to your main branch.
When debugging, ask the AI to 'explain like a senior dev' to identify architectural smells rather than just quick fixes.
Always log the user's browser context during onboarding; most 'bugs' are actually environment-specific rendering issues.
Implement a 'silent' feedback loop where failed onboarding steps trigger a hidden log entry you can review later.
resources: State Machine Patterns for SaaS: https://xstate.js.org/docs
content.next_steps: Now that your onboarding is debugged and resilient, focus on building an analytics dashboard to track conversion rates at each step of the flow.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting bugs dictate your progress. Build with the confidence of a lead engineer and turn your onboarding into a competitive advantage. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
